title: tragacantha glabrifolia
intro: Tragacantha glabrifolia, also known as the smooth astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Tragacantha glabrifolia include its potential to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. It is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make tinctures and ointments.
